\tzpentry{ID3552}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3552 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ p_\mu p^\mu = (mc)^2, \]
